parts.title: Transcript
parts.annotated_transcript_html:
Speaker 1 (Furniture Shop): Good afternoon, Furniture Planet. How can I help you?

Speaker 2 (Gordon Cooper): Hi, I'm calling about an item I ordered from your website last week. The package arrived safely, but when I opened it, I noticed that there was a part missing and that one of the pieces was broken.

Speaker 1: Oh, I'm sorry to hear that. In order to get new parts sent out to you, I need to take a few details. Is that all right?

Speaker 2: Of course.

Speaker 1: Great. First of all, can I take your full name, please?

Speaker 2: Sure. It's Gordon Cooper.

Speaker 1: OK, great. Got that. And your address, please, Mr. Cooper?

Speaker 2: It's 77 Woolbridge Lane, White Sands, and the postcode is WS178GP.

Speaker 1: OK, and can you tell me the name of the item?

Speaker 2: Sure, no problem. It's a large pine bookcase. Main classic, I think it was called.

Speaker 1: Yes, that's right. OK, thank you. And do you have the order number there?

Speaker 2: Hold on, that'll be in the email you sent over. The order number. Um, let me check. Ah, yes, here we are. PT9475.

Speaker 1: Great, thanks. I've just entered that into the system. Yes, I can see the bookcase here. And which part was damaged, Mr. Cooper?

Speaker 2: The top shelf. It's broken down the middle.

Speaker 1: Oh, that's strange. I'm very sorry about that. Hold on, I'll check what we can do about it.

Speaker 2: OK.

Speaker 1: Right, well, we will offer you a complete replacement. First, we will arrange for a courier to collect the old package from you. When would be a good time for that?

Speaker 2: Well, I'm busy tomorrow, so that won't do. Late Wednesday afternoon would be perfect, though. Could we say 5.30?

Speaker 1: I'm sorry, the courier only works until 5pm.

Speaker 2: Oh, OK. In that case, 4.45 would be OK.

Speaker 1: Perfect. I'll pencil you in then. After that, you will receive the replacement item within five days. So that should be before this coming Saturday.

Speaker 2: Great, thanks. And finally, if there is any problem, how would you like us to contact you? By email or by telephone?

Speaker 2: By email, please. My email address is gcooper45 at mail.com.

Speaker 1: OK. Thank you, Mr. Cooper. We'll be sure to let you know if there are any problems.
